narrative: The scent of bruised nectarines and damp earth clings to the air as you slip your spare keys into your mother’s trembling palm. She leans in close, her eyes darting toward the shadows of the Community Garden Entrance, whispering about a man in a charcoal peacoat she saw lingering by your door. Your pulse thrums against your throat while the distant screech of a siren grows louder, cutting through the murmurs of the market crowd.
ack_line: You merge into the crowd at the fruit stand, successfully meeting your mother and handing over the keys as you press her for details about the apartment.

choices.label: Ask her for a description of the man's face
Lead her deeper into the garden's winding paths
Check your phone to see if Sloane replied

vars.name: Adventurer
vars.player_role: part-time barista balancing rent, friendships, and future plans
vars.character_profile: part-time barista balancing rent, friendships, and future plans

locations.name: the_grind_and_pour
locations.description: The scent of burnt espresso and lavender syrup clings to the exposed brick walls while the steam wand hisses like a cornered cat.

locations.name: apartment_4b
locations.description: Stacked pizza boxes and a dying spider plant crowd the laminate kitchen counter where your overdue electric bill sits under a chipped ceramic mug.

locations.name: the_82_bus_stop
locations.description: Diesel fumes hang heavy in the humid air as the screech of worn brakes signals another twenty-minute delay on your commute.

locations.name: mira_street_community_garden
locations.description: Damp earth and tomato vines offer a rare quiet reprieve from the distant hum of the freeway and the glare of streetlamps.

npcs.name: Elias Thorne
npcs.motivation: To keep the cafe profitable enough to avoid being bought out by a corporate chain.

npcs.name: Sloane Vance
npcs.motivation: To secure a headlining gig at The Velvet Room even if it means skipping their share of the utility bills.

npcs.name: Mrs. Gable
npcs.role: The neighborhood gossip and regular customer
npcs.motivation: To find a sense of connection through the exchange of small, stinging secrets over her daily decaf latte.

_world_bible.central_tension: The constant friction between the necessity of earning a paycheck and the fading energy required to build a life worth living.
_world_bible.entry_point: The milk pitcher burns your palm as the 8:00 AM rush surges through the door, and your phone buzzes in your pocket with a third missed call from your mother.

triggered_storylet: The radiator in the hallway hisses a dry, metallic rhythm that matches the thrum of your caffeine-induced headache. You tighten the strap of your canvas bag, feeling the heavy stack of unpaid utility bills pressing against your hip. Outside, the muffled roar of a distant garbage truck signals that the city is already moving, whether you are ready to join it as a {player_role} or not.
